title: Locard Exchange Principle Visualizer
description: Apply (Bloom L3) the Locard Exchange Principle to predict and verify what trace evidence is produced and transferred when two objects make physical contact.
creator: Forensic Science Intelligent Textbook
subject: Forensic Science
Trace Evidence
Locard Exchange Principle
bloomLevel: Apply (L3) — predict and verify what trace evidence transfers when two objects make physical contact.
chapter_title: Foundations of Forensic Science and Legal Principles

educational.topic: Trace Evidence and the Locard Exchange Principle
learningObjectives: Apply the Locard Exchange Principle to predict two-way trace transfer.
Connect specific trace types to the laboratory methods that identify them.
educational.prerequisites: Concept of trace evidence; basic idea of physical contact

pedagogical.interactionPattern: Predict-Test-Observe: scenario selection, prediction prompt, contact animation, evidence inventory
pedagogical.assessment: Students predict transfer before each contact, then verify against the evidence inventory
